items.name_cn:
🆕 25c handle bowling bag In stock❤️
Very soft lambskin material, excellent touch. Super soft and smooth to the touch🥰 even the chain handle is soft. Structured and not saggy, the leather has a matte finish🖤
Generous capacity, fits large phones📱 perfectly and Pro Max is also completely fine!! Plenty of space left, the weight is still very light after packing😎
Great for hand carry or crossbody/shoulder, very stylish🤩
A keyword to summarize it is: light and chic!
5300~
size:19×14×7cm

🆕 25c hobo classic chain evening bag/box bag
❤In stock, this one is bound to be hot🔥
The box bag series is always in high demand! Very versatile!
Calfskin material, durable! Capacity is OK, fits phone and wallet~
The handle part has a clasp that can be opened!
The chain strap is detachable! Can also be knotted to adjust length!
Size:21.5-6-19cm
Model:4386~

items.name_en: New Arrival French High-End Custom Chane1
items.name_cn:
New Arrival French High-End Custom Chane1
AS4654# Chane1 Mini Full-Diamond Flap Bag, Latest Fall/Winter Hardware ~ Made of imported sheepskin, top craftsmanship, perfect handiwork!
Whether for street wear or parties, this metal design is easy to handle. It took a lot of time and effort, with every detail striving for perfection. The inside and outside are made of lambskin, with a soft and delicate touch.
It looks super good when worn. It can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, and the strap can be removed.
size: 14.5x19.5x8cm

specs.rawTitle:

Whether for street wear or parties, this metal design is easy to handle. It took a lot of time and effort, with every detail striving for perfection. The inside and outside are made of lambskin, with a soft and delicate touch.

items.name_en: New Arrival French High-End Custom Chanel
items.name_cn:
New Arrival French High-End Custom Chanel
Chane1🖤23A Diamond Handle CF Early Drop AS4141🥇Large
The most grandest collection of the year, the Atelier collection was originally scheduled to launch in June, but unexpectedly launched quietly in May🦢
This is the style I'm most looking forward to this season, and it's already out of stock rhythm💓
I got both sizes, the handle is leather with metal and diamonds💗
🖤The diamond handle is just too beautiful, no girl can resist it
🎗️size:14-20-7CM

items.name_en: New Arrival French High-End Custom Chanel
items.name_cn:
New Arrival French High-End Custom Chanel
Chane 23s |🖤This season's little black shell bag AS5130 patent leather👸🏻
This season's very eye-catching Chanel patent leather shell bag💎💎
Although it's small (even shorter than the wallet I bought ten years ago.......) it can hold keys, compact powder, lipstick, and even a folded Samsung phone. Very cute!🐶🐶
My SA is obsessed after seeing the real thing!
I think it's the cutest bag this season, and the value for money is better than other small bags🥇Size:15-20-6CM

specs.rawTitle:
New Arrival French·High-End Custom Chanel
Chanel🖤23A Diamond Handle CF Mini Pre-release Get it early 💎AS4140🥇Small Size
The most grand season of the year, the Atelier collection, was originally scheduled for June release, but unexpectedly arrived in May 🦢
This season's most anticipated piece is again a 'sold out' rhythm 💓
Got both sizes, the handle is leather over metal with added diamonds 💗
🖤The diamond handle is just too beautiful, no girl can resist it 🎗️Small size:13-18-6.5CM

items.name_cn:
New Arrival French·High-End Custom Chanel
AS4133# Chanel23A The Ultimate Mini31bag A Fashion Icon! The classic 31bag returns, timeless style!
Two sizes, large and mini, to suit different styles~ The large is super cool and chic, the mini is obedient, cute, and charming.
This chocolate brown is also a treasure color, the most recommended besides black. The real thing is very durable and high-end!
Reptile leather, practical capacity, one bag for multiple occasions is no problem!
size:22x23x5.5cm
